Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We need to generate a temporal profile dictionary for a supply chain process

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The temporal profile considers pairs A B where A eventually precedes B in at least one trace

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The process flow order is SS OP RC QI CA PT PK WS DT AS

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: So any pair X Y where X is before Y in this sequence is valid

Name: Deductive Reasoning - IND
Text: So total number of pairs 10 9 2 45

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: But the prompt says a representative subset so not necessarily all 45 but enough to show complexity including pairs separated by multiple steps

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: I think providing all 45 would be comprehensive

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: I need to assign average time and standard deviation for each pair reflecting realistic supply chain delays

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Lets estimate SS to OP average 2 days OP to RC 7 to 10 days RC to QI 1 day QI to CA half day CA to PT half day to 1 day PT to PK half day PK to WS 4 hours WS to DT 2 days DT to AS 1 to 3 days

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: For non neighbor pairs I need to sum averages and combine standard deviations properly

Name: Validation - PE
Text: The prompt says it is the observed time between those activities not just the sum of means

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: For a linear sequence if the times between consecutive activities are independent the average time from X to Y is sum of averages and variance is sum of variances

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Better to stay coherent so I will define base segment times and then derive all pairs

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Actually we need the time between the end of X and the start of Y or completion to completion For simplicity I will assume completion to completion and define consecutive segment durations that way

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: I will assign base segment durations SS OP 172800 86400 OP RC 864000 259200 RC QI 86400 43200 QI CA 43200 14400 CA PT 86400 43200 PT PK 43200 21600 PK WS 14400 7200 WS DT 172800 86400 DT AS 259200 129600

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Then for any pair X Y where Y is after X the total time is the sum of segments from X to Y and the standard deviation is the square root of the sum of squared segment standard deviations

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - IND
Text: These look reasonable

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: I will generate all combinations where first index is before second index according to the process order

Name: Validation - IND
Text: The answer should be the Python dictionary

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - IND
Text: I could provide a subset but to be safe I will provide all possible pairs as it is comprehensive and shows complexity
